claim: 20X companies automate all internal functions (code, support, marketing, sales, hiring, QA) using AI, not just one or two, multiplying employee productivity
actionable: Systematically identify and automate every manual process in your company; target comprehensive automation across all functions, not just engineering
source_title: The New Way To Build A Startup

claim: Atlas agent at GigaML (a 4-5 engineer team) closed DoorDash against 20x larger competitors by having better internal automation and product
actionable: Use AI agents for customer-facing work (integration, boilerplate) so humans focus on relationships and decision-making
source_title: The New Way To Build A Startup

claim: Agents can double or triple engineer scope by handling boilerplate work, reducing context switching and allowing focus on complex problems
actionable: Delegate all boilerplate code generation and routine fixes to agents; reserve human attention for architectural decisions and edge cases
source_title: The New Way To Build A Startup

claim: Legion Health grew 4x in patient volume while keeping ops headcount flat by using a single source of truth interface powered by AI
actionable: Build unified interfaces that consolidate fragmented systems; layer AI on top to surface context across data sources
source_title: The New Way To Build A Startup

claim: Feathr, a 12-person team, competes against century-old companies with hundreds of employees by automating all manual processes with AI agents
actionable: Identify manual processes in your domain; build custom agents for each workflow step to enable small teams to compete with incumbents
source_title: The New Way To Build A Startup
